name: Espresso-Hazelnut Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place butter and sugar in a mixing bowl and beat on low speed until blended.
3. Add flour, espresso grounds, salt, and hazelnuts. Mix on low speed for 3-5 minutes until the dough comes together. It will look dry just before it comes together.
4. Place dough on a lightly floured board and roll out to 1/4 inch thickness.
5. Using shaped cookie cutters, cut out shortbread cookies. Chill for 1 hour before baking.
6. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place the shortbread on the pan so they are not touching.
7. Bake for 45 minutes until firm. They will remain white in color.
8. Note: The great thing about this shortbread dough is that after you have cut out the shapes, you can freeze them and just place them in the oven when you are ready to bake.
